title: BACKND Base receipt verification and refund flows
summary: Covers in-app purchase receipt validation, platform-specific verification setup, Unity IAP 5 guidance, and refund-related follow-up flows in BACKND Base.
capabilities: route purchase validation questions to the right platform-specific page
distinguish integrated receipt validation from manual platform-specific flows
highlight prerequisites such as console setup and login context
surface refund-related follow-up routes when purchase state reconciliation is needed
prerequisites: The relevant store console configuration is complete for the target platform
The app has access to the correct receipt payload format for the current purchase stack
The caller knows whether Google Play, iOS, or ONE Store behavior applies
common_pitfalls: Generating receipt logic without checking the current Unity IAP version assumptions
Using platform-specific verification behavior interchangeably across Google Play, iOS, and ONE Store
Ignoring currency, product ID, or receipt formatting rules that affect successful validation
public_notes: Receipt validation is especially sensitive to version and platform details, so agents should always recheck the official route before producing code or operational guidance.
This pack intentionally stores routing and caution metadata, not store-console setup text or official receipts examples verbatim.
